explanation: The user's utterance 'go and pickup' implies a sequence of actions: first going to the object (potato_0) and then picking it up. The state indicates that potato_0 is on top of the DiningTable and has already been found. Since the robot is not currently holding any object, it can proceed to go to the potato and pick it up. The plan follows the logical sequence: first move to the object, then pick it up. The object potato_0 is used as-is because it is already referenced in the discussed_objects with suffix _0, and no new object is introduced.
